data.title: Hero Inside
data.synopsis:
Heroes can pop out of their comic books when summoned in this comedic action-adventure.

The cartoonist Scott mysteriously disappears, leaving behind 100 volumes of superhero comic books that spread throughout San Francisco. The protagonist, Mike, stumbles upon "Crying Man" and ends up summoning the superhero from the book, forever changing his life. But it's not just Mike, but many people begin to summon superheroes from these comic books, leading to a series of events unfolding throughout San Francisco.

data.title: Flow
data.synopsis:
All living things are born and die. Water flows and never returns back. The money you have might be gone away. However, you might become friends with someone who was your enemy. Everything keep changing and never be the same. Even these ideas could be changed, just in a moment.

(Source: Vimeo)

data.title: Mahoutsukai no Yakusoku
data.synopsis:
On her way home, kindhearted high school student Akira Masaki is whisked away to another world full of magic. Those who can wield it are called wizards, and some are chosen to fight against the Great Calamity annually. Although battling the catastrophe was manageable in the past, it has become so powerful that it has claimed many lives.

In the midst of all the chaos, the Great Sage has the power to guide the chosen wizards in the combat against the Great Calamity—a role that has been passed to Akira. Even though the girl desires to return home, she agrees to stay with the surviving wizards and help them find their new comrades scattered across five countries. Akira must now convince them to join the cause and lead the group against the imminent evil.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Mahoutsukai no Yakusoku is an adaptation of the 2019 mobile video game of the same title developed by Coly. The series was released on Blu-ray in three volumes from April 23, 2025, to June 25, 2025.

data.title: Make It Funky Now
data.synopsis: Abstract videoclip for the song Make It Funky Now (BMS edit) by DOT96, featuring daily life items which synchronize with the music.
data.background: This clip was originally released at FRENZ 2019 in September 15th 2019 then uploaded to Youtube and Vimeo on the 21st day of that month.

data.title: Sand Land: The Series
data.synopsis:
In the far future, war has destroyed the entire Earth, leaving only a barren wasteland where the supply of water is controlled by the greedy king. In search of a long-lost lake, Sheriff Rao asked the king of the demons for help...and got the king's son, Beelzebub, and his assistant, Thief. Together the unlikely trio sets off across the desert, facing dragons, bandits and the deadliest foe of all... the King's army itself! 

(Source: Viz Media)
